emails.subject: Southern Trails Project
emails.body: Southern Trails Project Do you have some time next week to bring you up to date on the project. Let Tracy and I know your availability for next week. Thanks, James

emails.subject: RE: Southern Trails Project
emails.body: RE: Southern Trails Project I am out of town starting Tuesday afternoon, but am free most of the day Monday and Tuesday am. Cheers.

emails.subject: FW: Southern Trails Project
emails.body: MIchael Please put on your calendar to meet with Tracy and me in Tracy Office at 9:00AM, Tuesday, October 23rd. thanks James
